# Copilot instructions

This project's shared rules live in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md). Read it first.

VS Code's Copilot Chat is configured (via [.vscode/settings.json](../.vscode/settings.json) → `chat.agentFilesLocations`) to auto-load `AGENTS.md` from the project root, so its content is already in your context.
